title: Add roadmap view to the cloud board
description:
Context: the local board has a roadmap view (internal/tickboard/ui/src/components/roadmap-view.ts, fed by the local /api/roadmap endpoint built on internal/query/roadmap.go) showing epic chains with done/active/queued badges. The cloud board has no equivalent, so someone monitoring a long Claude-orchestrated run from the cloud UI cannot see which epic is active or how the chain is progressing - only the tick-level kanban.

Deliverable: a roadmap panel in the cloud board UI showing epic chains (epics linked via blocked-by) with per-epic status badge (done / active / queued / awaiting gate) and child-tick progress (closed/total). The cloud already syncs full tick state (epics included) to the Durable Object (cloud/worker/src/project-room.ts), so the chain can be computed client-side from synced ticks - mirror the chain-derivation logic of the local roadmap view rather than adding a new sync message. Match the existing cloud UI's look (Catppuccin Mocha variables, ticks-* components).

Test cases:
- two epics A <- B (B blocked-by A), A has 3/4 children closed -> A renders active with 3/4 progress, B renders queued
- epic with awaiting/requires gate -> gate badge rendered
- no epics -> panel hidden or empty state, no errors

Run: pnpm test in cloud/worker (or wherever the cloud UI tests live - check cloud/ layout first).

Files likely touched: cloud worker UI components + tests (locate the UI source under cloud/), no Go changes expected.
notes: 2026-06-10 19:27 - Final-review fix merged: roadmap-compute.ts now gates on awaiting OR legacy manual (awaiting_type falls back to 'work'), matching Go IsAwaitingHuman semantics; +3 tests; static rebuilt on top of merged epic branch; UI websocket codegen output (actor field) committed in sync.
acceptance_criteria: Cloud board renders epic chains with status badges and child progress computed from synced ticks; UI tests cover the three listed cases and pass
closed_reason: Completed: cloud board roadmap view — roadmap computed client-side from synced ticks in cloud mode (roadmap-compute.ts port of internal/query/roadmap.go, 28 tests); local mode unchanged
